titles.title: COSMOS: A numerical relativity code specialized for PBH formation

citation.article_title: Simulating coalescing compact binaries by a new code SACRA
citation.author: Yamamoto
citation.unstructured_citation: Yamamoto, T., Shibata, M., & Taniguchi, K. (2008). Simulating coalescing compact binaries by a new code SACRA. Physical Review D, 78, 064054. https://doi.org/10.1103/PhysRevD.78.064054

citation.article_title: Black holes and fundamental fields in numerical relativity: initial data construction and evolution of bound states
citation.author: Okawa
citation.unstructured_citation: Okawa, H., Witek, H., & Cardoso, V. (2014). Black holes and fundamental fields in numerical relativity: initial data construction and evolution of bound states. Physical Review D, 89(10), 104032. https://doi.org/10.1103/PhysRevD.89.104032

citation.author: Yoo
